fields.name: issuerUrl
fields.label: OIDC issuer URL
fields.help: The OIDC issuer (realm) URL deployed services use for login. For a MANAGED/REMOTE context KDPS reads it from the (local/remote) Ambari oidc-env; for an EXTERNAL context, set it here.

fields.name: adminRealm
fields.label: Keycloak admin realm
fields.help: Realm that hosts the admin/registration client (usually 'master'). Only needed when KDPS registers service clients itself (source=internal).

fields.name: adminClientId
fields.label: Client-registration client ID
fields.help: A Keycloak service-account client (with manage-clients / client-registration rights) KDPS authenticates AS to CREATE an OIDC client for each deployed service. For MANAGED/REMOTE KDPS reads it from oidc-env; for EXTERNAL, provide it here. Leave the admin fields blank to use a pre-registered client instead (source=external).

fields.name: adminClientSecret
fields.label: Client-registration client secret
fields.help: Secret paired with the registration client ID. For an EXTERNAL context, enter it here (stored encrypted); for MANAGED/REMOTE it is read from oidc-env at registration time. When admin client ID + secret are present KDPS registers service clients directly against this Keycloak (source=internal); otherwise a pre-registered client's id/secret must be supplied on the security profile.

fields.name: verifyTls
fields.label: Verify Keycloak TLS
fields.help: true/false — whether KDPS verifies the Keycloak server certificate when registering clients. For MANAGED/REMOTE read from oidc-env (oidc_verify_tls).

fields.name: principalDomain
fields.label: Principal domain
fields.help: Optional principal domain appended to usernames (maps to the service's authorizer principalDomain).
